title: SatForge
description: A from-scratch CDCL SAT solver studio — two-watched literals, VSIDS, first-UIP learning, restarts — that emits machine-checkable DRAT proofs of UNSAT and re-verifies them in-browser with an independent RUP/RAT checker. Plus an exact #SAT model counter (component caching), minimal-unsat-core (MUS) extraction, and encoders for N-Queens, Sudoku, graph coloring, Hamiltonian cycles, integer factoring (a multiplier circuit run backwards), and Einstein's zebra puzzle. Implication-graph, trace, proof, and count visualizers included.
